title: ficus obtusa var. genuina
intro: Ficus obtusa var. genuina, also known as the 'Genuine Rubber Fig', is a variety of the Ficus obtusa plant, a species of fig tree native to East Asia. The leaves and bark of the Ficus obtusa var. genuina plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of fever, as well as acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Ficus obtusa var. genuina is typically prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties, although its use may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
